task_completion.description: Verify the Azure shape library is loaded and used in draw.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io application is open with the 'Azure' shape library visible in the left-hand panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the initial flow from Devices to IoT Hub to Stream Analytics
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the draw.io canvas, there is a shape representing 'Devices' connected by an arrow to an 'Azure IoT Hub' shape, which is then connected by an arrow to an 'Azure Stream Analytics' shape.

task_completion.description: Verify the cold path to Azure Data Lake Storage
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arrow points from the 'Azure Stream Analytics' shape to an 'Azure Data Lake Storage' shape.

task_completion.description: Verify the hot path to Azure Cosmos DB
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arrow points from the 'Azure Stream Analytics' shape to an 'Azure Cosmos DB' shape, demonstrating the pipeline split.

task_completion.description: Verify the connection from Cosmos DB to Power BI
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arrow points from the 'Azure Cosmos DB' shape to a 'Power BI' shape.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is saved as a .drawio file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'smart_city_iot.drawio' being saved to the Desktop, or the file appearing on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is exported as a PNG image
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the filename 'smart_city_iot.png' being saved to the Desktop, or the PNG file appearing on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the draw.io GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io interface with the canvas being actively edited, rather than terminal commands generating files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the diagram was built from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show shapes being added one by one or in stages, rather than a completed diagram suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: Verify the PNG was exported using draw.io
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu or dialog should be visible, ensuring the agent didn't just use a terminal tool to convert a file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a diagram in draw.io (version 26.0.9) using specific Azure components. The required shapes are: IoT Hub, Stream Analytics, Cosmos DB, Data Lake Storage, and Power BI. The flow must be: Devices -> IoT Hub -> Stream Analytics. From Stream Analytics, it splits to Data Lake Storage (cold path) and Cosmos DB (hot path). Cosmos DB then connects to Power BI. The final files must be saved as /home/ga/Desktop/smart_city_iot.drawio and exported as /home/ga/Desktop/smart_city_iot.png.
